import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
import numpy as np

def task_func(data, column='c'):
    # Check if data is not empty and has at least one numeric column
    if not data or (data.select_dtypes(np.number).empty):
        return None

    # Remove the specified column from the DataFrame
    data = data.drop(column, axis=1)

    # Compute the correlation matrix of the remaining numeric columns
    corr = data.corr()

    # Create a heatmap of the correlation matrix
    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 10))
    sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True, cmap="coolwarm")

    # Return the Axes object of the heatmap
    return plt.gca()
